prophecies.q: 《亚瑟王宫廷里的康涅狄格州扬基人》中对技术崇拜的讽刺
prophecies.a: 「我是一个扬基人中的扬基人——而且毫不感伤地实际。……我可以制造任何东西——枪炮、左轮手枪、大炮、锅炉、发动机，凡是能想到的机械。……如果没有适当的东西可以发明，我会发明一个。」
prophecies.q_en: Satire of tech worship in A Connecticut Yankee in King Arthur's Court
prophecies.a_en: "I am an American. I was born and raised in Hartford, in the State of Connecticut... I am a Yankee of the Yankees — and practical; yes, and nearly barren of sentiment... I could make anything a body wanted... and if there wasn't any quick new-fangled way to make a thing, I could invent one."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 小说中「扬基人」用先进技术改造中世纪社会、最终导致大规模毁灭的情节，映射了技术乌托邦主义的危险。2023年人工智能热潮中，「技术解决一切」的硅谷叙事与吐温笔下的盲目技术崇拜如出一辙，AI安全风险成为全球热议话题。
prophecies.verdict_en: The novel's Yankee uses advanced technology to transform medieval society, ultimately causing mass destruction — mirroring the dangers of tech utopianism. The 2023 AI boom saw Silicon Valley's 'technology solves everything' narrative echo Twain's blind tech worship, as AI safety risks became a global concern.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「人是唯一拥有真正宗教的动物——也是唯一为此而战的动物。」
prophecies.q_en: On the relationship between religion and war
prophecies.a_en: "Man is the only animal that has the True Religion — several of them. He is the only animal that loves his neighbor as himself and cuts his throat if his theology isn't straight."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2001年9·11事件及随后的「反恐战争」将宗教冲突推上全球舞台。极端主义以宗教之名发动恐怖袭击，而反击行动也常被赋予宗教色彩。21世纪宗教极端主义造成的冲突印证了吐温对「以神之名互相残杀」的讽刺。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 9/11 attacks in 2001 and the subsequent 'War on Terror' brought religious conflict to center stage globally. Extremism launched attacks in religion's name while counter-operations were often given religious overtones. 21st-century religious extremism validates Twain's satirical observation about killing neighbors over theology.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q: 短篇小说《1904年伦敦泰晤士报》中描述的全球信息网络
prophecies.a: 「这项发明叫做'远距电视镜'（Telelectroscope）……这个伟大的装置，连同电话的限时通话服务，使得地球的日常事务实际上变得对每个人可见……整个地球与全世界所有人的日常活动都在每个人的视野之内。」
prophecies.q_en: Global information network described in 'From the London Times of 1904'
prophecies.a_en: "The improved 'telelectroscope'... this great invention, with the telephone's limit-loss addition, had made the daily doings of the globe visible to everybody... The daily life of every corner of the globe was made visible to everyone, and audibly discussable too."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 吐温在1898年描述的「远距电视镜」——一种连接全球、使人们能够看到和讨论世界各地日常事务的网络——与1990年代万维网的诞生高度吻合。蒂姆·伯纳斯-李于1991年发布了第一个网页，到1995年互联网已成为全球性信息平台。
prophecies.verdict_en: Twain's 1898 'Telelectroscope' — a global network enabling people to see and discuss daily events worldwide — closely mirrors the World Wide Web. Tim Berners-Lee launched the first website in 1991, and by 1995 the internet had become a global information platform.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q: 远距电视镜中对即时全球通信的描述
prophecies.a: 「通过这台仪器的巨大屏幕，可以看到千里之外正在发生的事情，并且能够与对方实时交谈……一个人可以在自己的壁炉旁，看到地球上任何一个地方此刻正在发生的事。」
prophecies.q_en: Instant global communication via the Telelectroscope
prophecies.a_en: "By means of this great screen one could see what was happening a thousand miles away, and converse with the people there in real time... A person could sit by his fireside and see what was happening at that moment in any part of the world."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 吐温描述的「在壁炉旁通过屏幕实时观看全球事件并交谠」精确预见了视频通话和直播技术。2010年Apple FaceTime发布、Skype视频通话普及，人们确实能在家中通过屏幕实时看到并与全球各地的人交谈。
prophecies.verdict_en: Twain's description of 'sitting by a fireside watching global events through a screen in real time' precisely foreshadowed video calling and live streaming. By 2010, with Apple FaceTime and Skype, people could indeed see and talk to anyone worldwide from home through a screen.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q: 远距电视镜中对「网络审判」的预见
prophecies.a: 「通过远距电视镜，整个世界都目睹了这场审判。每个人都可以在家中观看、评论和讨论。法庭不再只属于法官和律师，它属于全人类。」
prophecies.a_en: "The whole world watched the trial through the Telelectroscope. Everyone could observe, comment, and discuss from their homes. The courtroom no longer belonged to judges and lawyers alone — it belonged to all mankind."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 社交媒体时代的「网络公审」现象精确印证了这一预见。2020年代高关注度案件（如美国Depp诉Heard案、中国多起社会事件）通过直播和社交媒体被全民围观讨论，「人人都是法官」的景象与吐温描述的场景如出一辙。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'trial by social media' phenomenon precisely validates this prediction. High-profile 2020s cases (Depp v. Heard, various viral incidents) were watched and debated by millions through livestreams and social media. The 'everyone is a judge' scenario matches Twain's description exactly.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q: 论帝国主义与「文明开化」的虚伪
prophecies.a: 「对坐在黑暗中的人，给了他太多的光明。对此行径有一个词可以形容……那个词就是掠夺。掠夺、偷窃与抢劫——在旗帜下、在十字架下进行的；借着福音传播之名。」
prophecies.q_en: On imperialism and the hypocrisy of 'civilization'
prophecies.a_en: "There have been lies; yes, but they were told in a good cause... The Blessings-of-Civilization Trust has been trading with the people who sit in darkness... There is more money in it, more territory, more sovereignty, and other kinds of emolument, than there is in any other game that is played."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 吐温对帝国主义以「文明开化」为名进行掠夺的批判，在2003年伊拉克战争中得到印证。美国以「大规模杀伤性武器」和「传播民主」为名入侵伊拉克，事后证实情报有误，战争造成数十万伊拉克平民死亡，资源掠夺的质疑至今未消。
prophecies.verdict_en: Twain's critique of imperialism disguised as 'civilization' was validated by the 2003 Iraq War. The US invaded Iraq under claims of 'WMDs' and 'spreading democracy', later proven based on faulty intelligence. The war caused hundreds of thousands of civilian deaths, and allegations of resource exploitation persist.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「每当你发现自己站在多数人一边时，就该停下来反思了。」
prophecies.q_en: On the conformist nature of humanity
prophecies.a_en: "Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to pause and reflect."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2008年全球金融危机是从众心理导致灾难的典型案例。银行家、评级机构和投资者集体涌入次级抵押贷款市场，几乎所有人都认为房价只升不降。多数人的共识最终酿成了大萧条以来最严重的经济危机。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2008 global financial crisis exemplified herd mentality leading to disaster. Bankers, rating agencies, and investors collectively poured into subprime mortgages, nearly everyone agreed housing prices could only rise. The majority consensus ultimately caused the worst economic crisis since the Great Depression.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「世界上有三种谎言：谎言、该死的谎言，以及统计数据。」
prophecies.q_en: On the three kinds of lies
prophecies.a_en: "There are three kinds of lies: lies, damned lies, and statistics."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 统计数据被操纵来支持预设立场的现象在21世纪愈演愈烈。2020年新冠疫情期间，各国政府和媒体选择性使用感染率、死亡率、疫苗有效性等统计数据，不同数据解读支持截然相反的结论——精确印证了吐温对统计数据可信度的质疑。
prophecies.verdict_en: Statistical manipulation to support predetermined conclusions has intensified in the 21st century. During the 2020 COVID-19 pandemic, governments and media selectively used infection, mortality, and vaccine efficacy statistics, with different interpretations supporting opposite conclusions — precisely validating Twain's skepticism of statistics.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q: 吐温预言自己将随哈雷彗星而去
prophecies.a: 「我随哈雷彗星而来，明年它将再度造访。我期待随它一同离去。如果我没有与哈雷彗星同去，那将是我一生最大的遗憾。上帝大概会说：看哪，这两个古怪的家伙，他们一起来的，也必须一起走。」
prophecies.q_en: Twain predicted he would die with Halley's Comet
prophecies.a_en: "I came in with Halley's Comet in 1835. It is coming again next year, and I expect to go out with it. It will be the greatest disappointment of my life if I don't go out with Halley's Comet. The Almighty has said, no doubt: 'Now here are these two unaccountable freaks; they came in together, they must go out together.'"
prophecies.verdict_zh: 马克·吐温出生于1835年11月30日，哈雷彗星到达近日点后两周。1910年4月20日，哈雷彗星最近地球的次日（4月21日），吐温因心脏病发作在康涅狄格州去世。这一预言精确应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: Mark Twain was born on November 30, 1835, two weeks after Halley's Comet reached perihelion. On April 21, 1910, the day after the comet's closest approach to Earth, Twain died of a heart attack in Connecticut. This prediction was fulfilled with remarkable precision.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q: 论新闻媒体的力量与危险
prophecies.a: 「如果你不看报纸，你是无知的；如果你看报纸，你是被误导的。」
prophecies.q_en: On the power and danger of news media
prophecies.a_en: "If you don't read the newspaper, you're uninformed. If you read the newspaper, you're misinformed."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 这一观察在社交媒体时代愈发切中要害。2020年新冠疫情期间，虚假信息泛滥，世界卫生组织将其称为「信息疫情」（infodemic）。无论关注还是不关注新闻，公众都面临获取准确信息的困境——这正是吐温百余年前所描述的两难。
prophecies.verdict_en: This observation has become even more relevant in the social media age. During the 2020 COVID-19 pandemic, misinformation was so rampant that the WHO coined the term 'infodemic'. Whether following or ignoring the news, the public faced the exact dilemma Twain described over a century ago.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「政客和尿布有一个共同点：他们都应该经常更换，而且理由相同。」
prophecies.a_en: "Politicians and diapers must be changed often, and for the same reason."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球范围内政治腐败和权力腐蚀持续验证这一观察。截至2020年，透明国际的腐败感知指数显示，全球超过三分之二的国家得分低于50（满分100），权力导致腐败的规律并未因时代进步而改变。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global political corruption continuously validates this observation. As of 2020, Transparency International's Corruption Perceptions Index showed over two-thirds of countries scoring below 50/100, confirming that power's tendency to corrupt has not diminished with time.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「买地吧，他们已经不再生产土地了。」
prophecies.a_en: "Buy land, they're not making it anymore."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2021年全球房地产市场达到历史高位。美国房价中位数较疫情前上涨超过30%，中国、加拿大、澳大利亚等国也经历了类似的房产泡沫。土地和房产作为稀缺资源持续升值的趋势，完美印证了吐温的直觉。
prophecies.verdict_en: The global real estate market hit historic highs in 2021. US median home prices rose over 30% from pre-pandemic levels, with similar bubbles in China, Canada, and Australia. The continued appreciation of land and property as scarce resources perfectly validates Twain's insight.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.q_en: On the cyclical nature of history
prophecies.a_en: "History doesn't repeat itself, but it often rhymes."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年俄罗斯入侵乌克兰，唤起了对20世纪领土扩张战争的记忆。大国博弈、经济制裁、代理人战争、核威胁——这些20世纪冷战的元素在21世纪以新形式重现。历史的「押韵」规律不断被证实。
prophecies.verdict_en: Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine evoked memories of 20th-century wars of territorial expansion. Great power rivalry, economic sanctions, proxy wars, nuclear threats — Cold War elements reappeared in new forms. The 'rhyming' pattern of history continues to be confirmed.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「我从来不让上学妨碍我受教育。」
prophecies.a_en: "I have never let my schooling interfere with my education."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 在线学习、自学平台和替代教育路径在21世纪蓬勃发展。Coursera、Khan Academy等平台让数亿人绕过传统学校接受教育；硅谷大量成功创业者并未完成大学学业。2020年疫情迫使全球教育转向线上，进一步证明正规学校教育并非获取知识的唯一途径。
prophecies.verdict_en: Online learning, self-education platforms, and alternative education paths flourished in the 21st century. Coursera, Khan Academy and similar platforms enabled hundreds of millions to learn outside traditional schools; many successful Silicon Valley founders lacked college degrees. The 2020 pandemic's forced shift to online education further proved formal schooling isn't the only path to knowledge.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters

prophecies.a: 「爱国主义就是确信你的国家优于所有其他国家，仅仅因为你出生在那里。」
prophecies.a_en: "Patriotism is supporting your country all the time, and your government when it deserves it... Loyalty to the country always. Loyalty to the government when it deserves it."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 21世纪民族主义浪潮在全球回潮：英国脱欧（2016）、美国「美国优先」政策（2017-2021）、全球范围内右翼民粹主义兴起。爱国主义被反复用于为排外政策、贸易保护主义辩护，印证了吐温对盲目爱国主义的警告。
prophecies.verdict_en: 21st-century nationalism surged globally: Brexit (2016), America First policy (2017-2021), right-wing populism worldwide. Patriotism was repeatedly invoked to justify xenophobic policies and trade protectionism, validating Twain's warning against blind patriotism.
prophecies.yearReason: 马克·吐温在作品或信件中提及了该时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mark Twain mentioned this time in his works or letters
